microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive $14M+ business impact across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, and SAP.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service scheduling capabilities** that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new standard for continuous validation.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.
Built and maintained a structured web roadmap and sprint backlog across 6+ engineering stakeholders, running project cycles that kept delivery on schedule and **increased drill capacity by 21%**.
Scaled team leverage via an internal **AI agent** that restructured planning workflows, cutting cycle time by 39% and freeing capacity to ship higher-impact resilience features each quarter.

Partnered with design and engineering to define requirements, QA deliverables, and establish KPIs for platform adoption, ensuring each release met performance targets and **measurable conversion to self-service usage**.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows by leading user demos and training sessions that activated utilization across 14 key Azure teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user research interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and delivering a prioritized backlog of conversion-driving improvements.

Optimized data retrieval and content performance by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting average lookup time by 83% and improving user engagement with key content.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, **accelerating region launches by 28%** and generating $3M in revenue impact through faster time-to-market.

Mobilized a product strategy to eliminate manual toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to surface conversion bottlenecks, target automation gaps, and prioritize the highest-ROI backlog items each sprint.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy for a **2,000+ unit pilot**, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and delivering zero operational downtime — a direct result of disciplined backlog ownership and cross-team QA.

Ran Agile sprint ceremonies including planning and retrospectives, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process by maintaining a tight, well-groomed backlog throughout the engagement.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable shipping cadence for future releases.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, building a CRM-powered workflow that improved conversion rates across every stage of the customer journey.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted site conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website experience, CTAs, and Google Business profile to improve traffic-to-lead conversion.
Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that directly increased per-job contribution.
